title: AlUla 10-Day Bucket List Trip
metaTitle: AlUla 10-Day Bucket List Trip | Flights, Hotels & Tours Included
metaDescription: Book a 10-day trip to AlUla, Saudi Arabia: round-trip flights, hotel, breakfast, transfers, and guided tours including Hegra (Mada'in Salih) guided tour and Maraya concert hall visit. Prices from $1975 per person (estimate).
highlights: Overnight desert camp stay under the stars
overview: Spend 10 days discovering AlUla, Saudi Arabia — Hot desert climate — scorching summers (May-September, highs regularly above 40°C) and mild, pleasant winters (November-February, highs 20-25°C, cool desert nights). Rain is rare year-round. November to February offers cool, comfortable desert temperatures (highs 20-25°C) ideal for exploring Hegra's tombs and canyon trails on foot; summer heat is intense and best avoided. This itinerary blends Hegra (Mada'in Salih) guided tour, Maraya concert hall visit, Elephant Rock viewing area with free time to explore at your own pace, backed by round-trip flights, handpicked accommodation, and a dedicated travel consultant from enquiry through departure.
included: Round-trip economy-class airfare from your selected origin city (upgrade to premium economy or business available)
9 nights accommodation in your selected category (Budget, Mid-range, Premium, or Luxury)
Daily local transport as per the itinerary
Guided tours including Hegra (Mada'in Salih) guided tour, Maraya concert hall visit, Elephant Rock viewing area
All entrance fees for attractions and activities listed in the itinerary
Applicable taxes and OTA service fee
Dedicated travel consultant support from booking through departure
notIncluded: Visa fees and travel document costs (see Visa Information)
Travel insurance (strongly recommended, available as an add-on)
Lunches and dinners except where noted in the itinerary
Optional activities not listed in the day-by-day itinerary
Airline seat selection and baggage upgrades
Any fare difference for premium economy or business class upgrades

itinerary.title: Arrive in AlUla
itinerary.description: Land at AlUla International Airport (Prince Abdulmajeed bin Abdulaziz Airport) (ULH) and take your included private transfer to your hotel. After settling in, ease into the trip with a relaxed visit to Hegra (Mada'in Salih) guided tour — Saudi Arabia's first UNESCO World Heritage Site — 111 monumental Nabatean tombs carved into sandstone. Round off the evening with a welcome dinner introducing you to local flavors.

itinerary.title: AlUla: Maraya concert hall visit & AlUla Old Town walking tour
itinerary.description: Morning visit to Maraya concert hall visit — The world's largest mirrored building, reflecting the surrounding desert canyon. In the afternoon, continue to AlUla Old Town walking tour — Restored century-old mudbrick town beneath the AlUla Fortress. Evening free to explore local restaurants and nightlife.

itinerary.title: AlUla: Elephant Rock (sunset experience) & Hot air balloon ride over AlUla valley
itinerary.description: Morning visit to Elephant Rock (sunset experience) — Massive elephant-shaped sandstone formation with a desert lounge for sunset. In the afternoon, continue to Hot air balloon ride over AlUla valley — Sunrise balloon flight over Hegra and the surrounding canyons. Evening free to explore local restaurants and nightlife.
activities: Hot air balloon ride over AlUla valley

itinerary.title: Day Trip to Madain Saleh extended Hegra tour
itinerary.description: Full-day excursion to Madain Saleh extended Hegra tour, a popular side trip from AlUla. Return to AlUla in the evening with time free to explore on your own.
activities: Guided day trip: Madain Saleh extended Hegra tour

itinerary.title: Leisure Day & Optional Activities
itinerary.description: A lighter day to recharge, shop, or add an optional experience. Popular choices include Jabal Ikmah open-air inscription "library" — your consultant can book add-ons like this on request.

itinerary.title: AlUla: Dadan and Jabal Ikmah rock art sites & Elephant Rock viewing area
itinerary.description: Morning visit to Dadan and Jabal Ikmah rock art sites — Ancient Lihyanite capital and an open-air "library" of inscriptions. In the afternoon, continue to Elephant Rock viewing area — Iconic natural sandstone formation, popular at sunset. Evening free to explore local restaurants and nightlife.
activities: Dadan and Jabal Ikmah rock art sites

itinerary.title: Day Trip to Tayma ancient oasis
itinerary.description: Full-day excursion to Tayma ancient oasis, a popular side trip from AlUla. Return to AlUla in the evening with time free to explore on your own.
activities: Guided day trip: Tayma ancient oasis

itinerary.title: AlUla: AlUla Arts District (SUPERNOVA and gallery walks) & Harrat Uwayrid escarpment viewpoints
itinerary.description: Morning visit to AlUla Arts District (SUPERNOVA and gallery walks) — Rotating contemporary art installations set against desert scenery. In the afternoon, continue to Harrat Uwayrid escarpment viewpoints — Volcanic plateau overlooking the AlUla valley. Evening free to explore local restaurants and nightlife.
activities: AlUla Arts District (SUPERNOVA and gallery walks)

itinerary.title: Leisure Day & Optional Activities
itinerary.description: A lighter day to recharge, shop, or add an optional experience. Popular choices include Harrat Uwayrid lava-field hiking trails — your consultant can book add-ons like this on request.

itinerary.title: Departure Day
itinerary.description: Enjoy a final morning at leisure — perhaps one last visit to AlUla Old Town exterior walk or some souvenir shopping — before your private transfer to ULH for your departure flight.

travelTips: Book Hegra tours in advance — access is guided-only and slots can fill up during the Winter at Tantora season.
Visit in winter (November-February); summer heat regularly exceeds 40°C and many outdoor sites are impractical.
Arrange transport through your hotel or a tour operator rather than relying on ride-hailing apps.
Alcohol is unavailable anywhere in the country — plan accordingly.
Respect photography etiquette — always ask before photographing local people.
Pace yourself — this itinerary includes free time so you are not rushing between every attraction.
packingList: Copies of booking confirmations and travel insurance
Lightweight, breathable clothing and a reusable water bottle
Modest, lightweight clothing covering shoulders and knees
Sturdy shoes for desert and canyon walking
Sun protection — hat, sunglasses, high-SPF sunscreen
A warm layer for chilly desert nights in winter
thingsToDo: Hot air balloon ride over AlUla valley
Dadan and Jabal Ikmah rock art sites
AlUla Arts District (SUPERNOVA and gallery walks)
thingsToAvoid: Expecting to visit Hegra independently without a guide — access is tour-guided only.
Visiting in peak summer heat (June-August) without serious sun/heat precautions.
Immodest clothing (shorts, sleeveless tops) outside of resort pool areas.
Assuming alcohol will be available at hotels — it is not sold anywhere in Saudi Arabia.
topRestaurants: Somewhere by Habitas — Contemporary Middle Eastern ($$$)
Basalt Restaurant — Fine Dining Desert Cuisine ($$$$)
AlUla Old Town cafes — Traditional Saudi ($$)
topCafes: Traditional Arabic coffee (qahwa) tents at desert camps
nightlife: Winter at Tantora seasonal event nights
instagramSpots: Maraya mirrored facade reflecting the canyon
Hot air balloons over the AlUla valley at sunrise
hiddenGems: Dadan archaeological site (older and quieter than Hegra)
luxuryExperiences: Overnight desert camp stay under the stars
Private guided tour of Hegra with an archaeologist
Sunrise hot air balloon with champagne breakfast (non-alcoholic, per local law)
Suite stay at Habitas AlUla eco-resort
honeymoonExperiences: Private sunset dinner at Elephant Rock
Stargazing under some of the clearest desert skies in the region
Hot air balloon ride together at sunrise
budgetExperiences: Elephant Rock at sunset — free to visit
Public evenings during the Winter at Tantora season

festivalCalendar.name: AlUla Winter at Tantora Season (arts, music, and desert experiences)

localEtiquette: Modest dress is expected for all visitors — shoulders and knees covered; loose, lightweight clothing is both respectful and practical in the heat.
Public displays of affection between couples should be minimal and discreet.
Photography of local people requires permission — always ask first.
Friday is the primary day of prayer; some services and attractions may adjust hours around midday prayer times.
Alcohol is not sold or served anywhere in Saudi Arabia, including international hotels.
localTransportGuide: AlUla is spread across a wide desert valley with sites well outside walking distance of each other — nearly all visitors book guided tours or arrange private drivers, as this is the standard and expected way to see Hegra and the surrounding sites (independent access to some heritage areas is restricted). Ride-hailing apps have limited coverage; arranging transport through your hotel or a tour operator is far more reliable.
bestTimeToVisit: November to February offers cool, comfortable desert temperatures (highs 20-25°C) ideal for exploring Hegra's tombs and canyon trails on foot; summer heat is intense and best avoided.
weather: Hot desert climate — scorching summers (May-September, highs regularly above 40°C) and mild, pleasant winters (November-February, highs 20-25°C, cool desert nights). Rain is rare year-round.
visaInformation: Most Western nationalities including the US, UK, EU, and Australian citizens can obtain a Saudi e-Visa online in minutes or a visa-on-arrival, valid for multiple entries over one year (90 days per visit). Verify current requirements against your specific passport before travel.
averageFlightTime: ~9.7h from major hubs (estimate; varies by origin — see Suggested Flights)
nearestAirport: AlUla International Airport (Prince Abdulmajeed bin Abdulaziz Airport) (ULH)
cancellationPolicy: Cancellations made 30+ days before departure: full refund minus a $99 processing fee. 15-29 days before departure: 50% refund. 0-14 days before departure or no-show: non-refundable. Airline and hotel supplier cancellation terms may be stricter than this policy and apply in addition — your travel consultant confirms exact terms before payment is taken. No online payment is collected on this site; a consultant confirms final pricing and availability with you directly before any booking is confirmed.
termsAndConditions: Pricing shown is per person based on the traveler type and tier selected and is an estimate pending live fare and rate confirmation.
Passports must be valid for at least 6 months beyond the return date for most destinations — confirm the exact requirement for your nationality.
Itinerary order may change due to weather, local conditions, or attraction closures; inclusions remain equivalent.
Solo travelers incur a single-room supplement, reflected in the Solo pricing tier.
This package does not include international travel insurance unless explicitly listed under Included.
Prices shown in a currency other than USD are approximate conversions at the rate noted and are not a payment quote.

faqs.question: Do I need a visa to visit AlUla?
faqs.answer: Most Western nationalities including the US, UK, EU, and Australian citizens can obtain a Saudi e-Visa online in minutes or a visa-on-arrival, valid for multiple entries over one year (90 days per visit). Verify current requirements against your specific passport before travel.

faqs.question: What is the best time to visit AlUla?
faqs.answer: November to February offers cool, comfortable desert temperatures (highs 20-25°C) ideal for exploring Hegra's tombs and canyon trails on foot; summer heat is intense and best avoided. Hot desert climate — scorching summers (May-September, highs regularly above 40°C) and mild, pleasant winters (November-February, highs 20-25°C, cool desert nights). Rain is rare year-round.

faqs.question: What's included in this package?
faqs.answer: Round-trip airfare, accommodation, daily breakfast, airport transfers, daily local transport, and guided tours to the attractions listed in the itinerary. See the Included / Not Included sections for full detail.

faqs.question: Can the itinerary be customized?
faqs.answer: Yes — this itinerary is a starting point. Your travel consultant can add, remove, or reorder activities, extend your stay, or upgrade your hotel category before you book.

faqs.question: What is the cancellation policy?
faqs.answer: Cancellations made 30+ days before departure: full refund minus a $99 processing fee. 15-29 days before departure: 50% refund. 0-14 days before departure or no-show: non-refundable. Airline and hotel supplier cancellation terms may be stricter than this policy and apply in addition — your travel consultant confirms exact terms before payment is taken. No online payment is collected on this site; a consultant confirms final pricing and availability with you directly before any booking is confirmed.

faqs.question: Is AlUla safe for tourists?
faqs.answer: AlUla is rated very safe for tourists, with low rates of violent crime. Usual travel precautions (watch belongings in crowds, use licensed taxis) still apply.

faqs.question: What currency should I bring to AlUla?
faqs.answer: The local currency is SAR. Cards and mobile payments are widely accepted, and ATMs are easy to find.

faqs.question: Is this package good for a honeymoon or family trip?
faqs.answer: This itinerary suits couples, solo travelers, and small groups equally well — talk to your consultant about tailoring it further.

reviews.author: Priya Garcia
reviews.title: So many hidden gems included
reviews.body: Booked this as a solo trip and it was well paced. Hot air balloon ride over AlUla valley in particular stood out. A couple of the transfers ran a little late but nothing that spoiled the trip.

reviews.author: Tom Garcia
reviews.title: Worth every penny
reviews.body: We added a couple of optional activities beyond AlUla Old Town exterior walk and don't regret it. Good value for what was included, and the food recommendations from our guide were spot on.

reviews.author: Noah van Dijk
reviews.title: Best vacation we've had
reviews.body: Our trip to AlUla was fantastic from start to finish. The hotel was clean and well located, and the guided visit to AlUla Arts District (SUPERNOVA and gallery walks) was a real highlight. Airport transfers were on time both ways.

reviews.author: Elena Botha
reviews.title: Luxury without the hassle
reviews.body: We added a couple of optional activities beyond Hegra (Mada'in Salih) guided tour and don't regret it. Good value for what was included, and the food recommendations from our guide were spot on.

reviews.author: Nadia Costa
reviews.title: Luxury without the hassle
reviews.body: AlUla is stunning and this package covered the essentials well, especially Harrat Uwayrid escarpment viewpoints. The hotel could have been a little closer to the center but transport was easy.

reviews.author: Wei Fernandez
reviews.title: Solid mid-range package
reviews.body: Booked this as a couple trip and it was well paced. Hegra (Mada'in Salih) guided tour in particular stood out. A couple of the transfers ran a little late but nothing that spoiled the trip.
